emergency_definition: active bee or wasp swarm inside an occupied structure
confirmed aggressive rodent infestation in a food service facility
bed bug discovery in a hotel property
active rodent activity in hospital or elder care facility

emergency_routing_rules.after_midnight_protocol: call back within 45 minutes and text Derek's personal line, 713-555-0250

non_emergency_routing_rules: take name, number, and service type, follow up next business day
integration_constraints: do not discuss chemical formulations or active ingredients on calls
after_hours_flow_summary: route emergencies to zone-based dispatch or Marcus Hill for hospital/elder care emergencies, non-emergencies to next business day follow-up
office_hours_flow_summary: transfer to main office or commercial team line
questions_or_unknowns: no clear definition of 'rapid response SLAs' for hotel properties
no clarification on how to handle multiple emergencies at once
notes: use greeting: 'Thank you for calling ShieldPest Control Group, protecting homes and businesses across Houston. How can I help you today?'
do not confirm or deny service area coverage on calls
never use the word 'guarantee' in relation to pest elimination
